title: SSR-043 As a new graduate boy, I got a job at a popular cosmetics company and was made into a sexual harassment pissing toilet by my beautiful boss - Haruhara Mirai
overview: The reality of the popular company Beauty Energy was an unusual company where female employees turned male employees into reverse sexual harassment, urine drinking, and human toilets! Middle-aged male employee writhes with fierce bullying and strong ● drinking urine! New employee Takahashi witnesses the scene of sexual bullying at the same time one after another! Intense slap, strong ● face sitting, strong ● ejaculation…. Takahashi also feels pleasure in the atrocities ● and knows the joy of the atrocities ...
